source_class: Exchange price and historical market data
notes: Used for price snapshots, returns, and historical replay context. Named-provider IDs are not published.

source_class: Market data and public attention rankings
notes: Used for market, volume, and public-attention context where available. Named-provider IDs are not published.
Used for public DEX pair, volume, transaction, and liquidity context. Named-provider IDs are not published.
Used for chain, protocol, and network context that may move more slowly than price. Named-provider IDs are not published.
Used for regional-market premium/discount comparisons. FX and local market structure can distort the reading.
Used for social attention, on-chain activity, and development context from reputable third-party analytics sources.
Only refreshed structured extractions should count as current time-tied evidence. Raw screenshots and full tables stay out of the public package.
Used only when a free or logged-in dashboard exposes relevant current context. Raw screenshots and full tables stay out of the public package.
Used as regional-language attention context. Named feed or site IDs are not published.
Fallback class for normalized third-party features that do not fit a narrower source class.
